LanguageData.WULA_ArmedShuttleWithPocket_Cleanzone_Fr: Clear an area and prepare resources so the Wula Empire mothership can dispatch a shuttle here.\n\nThe CVe-3 "Raven" is a special shuttle used by the Wula Empire to establish connections between the fleet and the surface. It features a massive cargo hold and an internally folded living area, giving it impressive carrying capacity and allowing activity inside. It also possesses a high-reflectance deflector shield and an MLt-1 "Prism" turbo-laser cannon, capable of resisting most attacks.
LanguageData.WULA_ArmedShuttleWithPocket_Cleanzone.de: Clear an area and prepare resources so the Wula Empire mothership can dispatch a shuttle here.\n\nThe CVe-3 "Raven" is a special shuttle used by the Wula Empire to establish connections between the fleet and the surface. It features a massive cargo hold and an internally folded living area, giving it impressive carrying capacity and allowing activity inside. It also possesses a high-reflectance deflector shield and an MLt-1 "Prism" turbo-laser cannon, capable of resisting most attacks.
LanguageData.WULA_ArmedShuttleWithPocket.label: CVe-3 "Raven"
LanguageData.WULA_ArmedShuttleWithPocket.description: A special shuttle used by the Wula Empire to establish connections between the fleet and the surface. It features a massive cargo hold and an internally folded living area, giving it impressive carrying capacity and allowing activity inside. It also possesses a high-reflectance deflector shield and an MLt-1 "Prism" turbo-laser cannon, capable of resisting most attacks.
LanguageData.WulaWall_Inner.label: Wula Empire Inner Bulkhead Wall
LanguageData.WulaWall_Inner.description: Wula Empire inner bulkhead wall, with embedded conduits capable of providing power from the shuttle.
LanguageData.WULA_PocketMapExit.label: Transport Lift Platform
LanguageData.WULA_PocketMapExit.description: Lift platform for transporting personnel and items in and out of the shuttle.
LanguageData.WULA_Shuttle_Autocannon.label: SRc-22 "Four-Leaf"
LanguageData.WULA_Shuttle_Autocannon.description: Autocannon equipped on Wula Empire shuttles, capable of organizing high-rate-of-fire barrages to suppress and kill large-scale targets.
LanguageData.Bullet_WULA_Shuttle_Autocannon.label: Four-Leaf Autocannon Bullet
LanguageData.ArmedShuttleIncoming_WULA.label: Armed Shuttle (Incoming)
LanguageData.ArmedShuttleLeaving_WULA.label: Armed Shuttle (Departing)
